entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Diet-induced deficiency of essential micronutrients causing health challenges globally

entities.name: DEVELOPING WORLD
entities.description: Regions characterized by lower industrialization and higher rates of micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of improving the micronutrient density of crops through genetic means

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of essential micronutrients within a food source

entities.name: NUTRIENT SUPPLEMENTATION
entities.description: A short-term strategy to address micronutrient malnutrition by providing nutrients in pill or liquid form

entities.name: FORTIFICATION
entities.description: A short-term strategy to address micronutrient malnutrition by adding nutrients to processed foods

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: An important global food crop adapted to semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Environmental regions where sorghum is commonly adapted

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall nutrient value and composition of a crop

entities.name: GRAIN MICRONUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: The specific concentration of micronutrients within the grains of a crop, specifically sorghum
